overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning at a sandy beach beside a dilapidated pier with a massive roller coaster structure. The camera moves from water level along the shore, ascends through an industrial building, and explores an elevated waterfront promenade with food stalls and scattered NPCs during golden hour sunset.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach at water's edge beneath industrial pier

agents.ego_description: moving along the shoreline at water level, approaching the massive roller coaster pier structure

entered.detail: large industrial pier structure with tall vertical supports and looping roller coaster tracks extending over the water
calm seawater lapping at the shore with sun reflections
wet sand and small debris at the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a low angle on a sandy beach beside calm ocean waters, looking toward a massive industrial pier with a roller coaster structure silhouetted against the bright golden hour sun. The camera moves steadily forward along the shoreline with no other characters present.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to industrial building with futuristic city skyline visible

events.description: moving from open beach to the base of the industrial pier building
approaching and beginning to ascend concrete stairs into the building structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward the industrial building while revealing the futuristic city skyline, then beginning to climb the exterior stairs

entered.detail: large concrete and metal building with geometric white framework on the roof serving as the pier base
tall futuristic towers with stacked architectural sections and neon holographic advertisements
glowing pink holographic sign floating near the skyscrapers
wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading up to the upper pier level

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the beach toward the industrial pier building, revealing a stunning futuristic city skyline with towering skyscrapers and neon holograms in the background. The ground transitions from sand to dirt and concrete as the camera approaches a wide staircase leading upward into the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell transitioning to upper pier platform

events.description: exiting the stairwell onto the open upper pier platform
emerging from shadowed stairwell into intense direct sunlight facing the sun

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs and emerging onto the sunlit upper platform of the pier

entered.detail: wide concrete walkway at the top of the pier with metal railings overlooking the ocean
massive steel roller coaster tracks silhouetted against the bright sun

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends through a shadowed concrete stairwell, then emerges at 26 seconds onto the upper pier platform directly facing the bright setting sun. The roller coaster tracks create dramatic silhouettes against the golden sky as the camera steps onto the open concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated promenade between industrial building and roller coaster structure

events.description: two NPCs sitting on side stairs come into view ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated promenade passing by two individuals sitting on a side staircase

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on concrete stairs, one with green hair and one with red hair, conversing

entered.detail: concrete wall with colorful graffiti and weathered textures
secondary concrete staircase with metal railings descending to lower level

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated promenade between a graffiti-covered industrial wall on the left and the massive roller coaster supports on the right. At 37 seconds, two NPCs are seen sitting on a side staircase, and the camera passes them while continuing along the concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: amusement pier plaza with food stalls and roller coaster entrance

events.description: entering the food stall plaza area with neon signage becoming visible
passing NPCs sitting on a concrete bench near the food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past food stalls and seated NPCs, approaching the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on a concrete bench, one reclining and one sitting upright

entered.detail: retro-style food stall with large neon sign reading RICK-A-SLICE
large illuminated sign reading MEGA ROLLER COASTER above the attraction entrance
weathered concrete bench with graffiti on the backrest

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza featuring vintage amusement park food stalls including 'RICK-A-SLICE' and the 'MEGA ROLLER COASTER' entrance. The camera passes two NPCs relaxing on a concrete bench before approaching a covered walkway with scaffolding on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with scaffolding and striped awnings

events.description: entering the covered walkway with industrial scaffolding and striped canopy overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway toward the ferris wheel visible in the distance

entered.detail: walkway covered by striped fabric awnings supported by metal scaffolding
industrial metal scaffolding structure with cross-bracing along the right side
large ferris wheel structure visible in the distance against the sky

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a semi-covered walkway with industrial scaffolding on the right and striped awnings overhead, creating dappled lighting. A ferris wheel becomes visible in the distance to the left as the camera continues forward through this transitional space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate sandy shoreline up into a bustling, elevated industrial promenade during a golden hour sunset. It begins at a low angle on the beach, moving steadily forward past calm waters toward a massive pier and a silhouetted roller coaster. As the terrain transitions from sand to concrete, the camera approaches a futuristic city skyline of neon holograms before ascending through a shadowed stairwell to emerge onto a bright, open upper platform. The scene then shifts along a concrete walkway flanked by graffiti-covered walls and massive supports, passing resting NPCs before opening into a wide plaza filled with vintage amusement park food stalls. Finally, the camera enters a semi-covered walkway with striped awnings and industrial scaffolding, where a distant ferris wheel becomes visible through the dappled light.
